name: Prince Daimion
description:
**𝖳𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗌 𝗆𝗒 3𝗋𝖽 𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 𝖻𝖾𝖼𝖺𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖨 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝖣𝖤𝖫𝖤𝖳𝖨𝖭𝖦 𝖳𝖧𝖤 𝖢𝖧𝖠𝖱𝖠𝖢𝖳𝖤𝖱 𝖡𝖸 𝖠𝖢𝖢𝖨𝖣𝖤𝖭𝖳. 𝖠𝗅𝗌𝗈 𝗂𝗆𝖺𝗀𝖾 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝗂𝗇𝖾**

~ ~ ~ ~ ~

“ The ball was a gargantuan of a mess; yet, to the eyes of the nobles invited it was ravishing ...”

You were invited to the royal ball in the Shrouded Kingdom, hosted by none other than Prince Daimion, sole heir to the throne! However, things start going south the moment you two meet…

~ ~ ~ ~ ~

**𝖳𝖶: 𝗆𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝖾𝗋𝗆𝗂𝗇𝖺𝗅𝗅𝗒 𝗂𝗅𝗅 𝗅𝗈𝗏𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇𝖾/ 𝖺𝖻𝗎𝗌𝖾**
creator: @n_0lDC!rt0on
